commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 30:16 And they stood in their place according to their custom, according to the law of Moses the man of God: the priests sprinkled the blood, which they received from the hand of the Levites. Cedron, as Josias did with the idolatrous altars, 4 Kings xxiii. The priests brought what was unclean from the inner temple into the porch. (Haydock) This labour lasted eight days, as the cleansing of the porches had done. (Calmet) (Du Hamel).
